mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 1.16% is substantially below the inflation-adjusted neutral rate. Persistent low rates signal monetary accommodation that suppresses long-term Treasury yields through portfolio rebalancing and reduced term premium. As accommodation persists, the 10-year yield remains depressed relative to nominal growth expectations.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises more than 25 basis points over the 20-day window despite FEDFUNDS remaining below 1.5%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any rolling 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Real retail sales (RSAFS) at 474,841M and housing starts (HOUST) at 1,155K indicate robust consumer demand and construction activity. Strong demand signals future inflation pressure, forcing the Fed to raise rates, which increases the 10-year Treasury yield as markets price in higher future policy rates.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls despite both RSAFS and HOUST meeting trigger thresholds in > 40% of instances, or joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: The unemployment rate at 4.4% is near historical lows, indicating tight labor markets. Tight labor conditions drive wage growth and inflation expectations, forcing the Fed to maintain or raise rates, which increases the 10-year Treasury yield as investors demand higher compensation for duration risk.
regime_hint: tight labor market with inflation concerns
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in > 55% of 60-day windows when UNRATE < 4.5%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) at 104.739 shows moderate supply-side capacity utilization. Weak supply growth relative to demand signals stagflationary pressure, causing the Fed to prioritize inflation control over growth support, raising rates and increasing the 10-year Treasury yield.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls despite both conditions met in > 45% of triggered instances, or interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) at 146,730K shows continued labor market strength. Rising employment supports consumer spending and inflation, prompting Fed tightening expectations. Higher expected future rates increase the 10-year Treasury yield as the market reprices duration risk.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in > 60% of 5-day windows following PAYEMS > 150K monthly gains, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP (GDPC1) at 17,030B indicates solid economic growth. Sustained growth above trend raises inflation expectations and Fed rate-hike probability, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise as investors demand higher yields for longer-duration bonds.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in > 55% of 60-day windows despite GDPC1 showing positive quarter-over-quarter growth, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The spread between CPIAUCSL (245.03) and FEDFUNDS (1.16%) indicates real rates are deeply negative. Negative real rates incentivize investors to demand higher nominal yields on long-duration assets, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher as the market seeks compensation for real purchasing power erosion.
regime_hint: negative real rates with inflation above policy rate
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls despite negative real rates in > 50% of triggered instances, or interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) at 1,155K combined with retail sales strength signal robust demand momentum. Demand acceleration forces the Fed to tighten policy faster than markets previously expected, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise sharply as forward rate expectations repriced upward.
candidate_trigger: HOUST > 1,150K AND RSAFS > 474,000M AND PAYEMS month-over-month > 100K
regime_hint: synchronized demand acceleration across housing, retail, and employment
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls in > 50% of windows where all three demand proxies meet thresholds simultaneously, or three-way interaction signal produces Rank IC < 0.05 over rolling 2-year windows.
